title: Easier work and a big time saver
excerpt: Inserting a link to another item/task in “Updates” should automatically adopt the name of the item as text (or at least suggest it). This is the same behaviour as already exists in the “Link” column.

posts.author: Kim1 (Guercke)
posts.cookedHtml: Inserting a link to another item/task in “Updates” should automatically adopt the name of the item as text (or at least suggest it). This is the same behaviour as already exists in the “Link” column.
